audit_items.proof_trace: alloy-evm is an abstraction layer that converts consensus transaction types into TxEnv for revm execution. The max_fee_per_blob_gas validation against blob_gas_price happens within the revm EVM during transaction execution (line 227 delegates to inner.transact(tx)), not at this abstraction layer. This property is enforced by the underlying revm library, which is outside the scope of alloy-evm codebase.
